values.value: Andersen Tax LLC Bates White Jacobs Holding AG

Multi-account full regression. For each account in the ACCOUNTS list (default: Bates White, Jacobs Holding AG, Baker McKenzie LLP), discovers contracts for all 3 OSA-selector branches, opens each quote, and runs the same all-product-category increase (same logic as IncreaseE2EFlow but with a richer pre-flight SOQL classification that handles Percent Of Total, unknown option types, and lines without data-line-id). Catches CPQ pricing-constraint save failures and skips rather than failing. Aggregates all per-scenario results in _allScenarioResults and writes one combined results.json in afterAll.
